case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JUAN F. ANGEL FLORES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $65.00) SERVED JAN-29-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, JUAN F. ANGEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-21-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-21-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY IRMA GUERRERO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, JUAN F. ANGEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE: $65.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, JUAN F. ANGEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORES, JUAN F. ANGEL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,615.00, ON DEFAULTED LOAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
